query: SELECT type, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_description FROM places GROUP BY type ORDER BY type
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT type, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_description FROM places GROUP BY type ORDER BY type
